weave_strike.name: Weave Strike
weave_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A strike that knots the target's spirit. Generates 15 Stamina and 1 Thread Pip.

spirit_infusion.name: Spirit Infusion
spirit_infusion.description: Setup: Infuse an ally or yourself with raw spiritual force. Generates 2 Thread Pips and grants [Focused].

soul_mend.name: Soul Mend
soul_mend.description: Payoff: Knit together a shattered soul. Consumes 5 Thread Pips to restore 50% HP to a target.

weave_explosion.name: Weave Explosion
weave_explosion.description: Payoff/AOE: Detonate spiritual threads in an area. Consumes 3 Thread Pips to deal damage and apply [Blinded].

spiritual_shield.name: Spiritual Shield
spiritual_shield.description: Defense: A field of interlocking spirit threads. Reduces incoming magic damage by 50% for 6 ticks.

thread_of_fate_blink.name: Fate Blink
thread_of_fate_blink.description: Defense/Mobility: Briefly jump to the spiritual plane to avoid danger.

weaving_dash.name: Weaving Dash
weaving_dash.description: Mobility: Dash forward, leaving a trail of spirit threads that slow enemies.

grand_weave_revival.name: Grand Weave
grand_weave_revival.description: Utility/Signature: For 30 ticks, every time an ally in the room uses an ability, they are healed for 5% of their Max HP.

soul_weaver_physiology.name: Soul Weaver Physiology
soul_weaver_physiology.description: Passive: Spirit Master. You gain 10% Magic power and your healing abilities are 20% more effective.
